home.hero_title: Structured Operational Maintenance for Institutional Facilities
home.hero_desc: Scheduled preventive service, continuous operational management, and documented control for organizations that value order, continuity, and planning.
home.brief_text: Structured institutional facility management with a direct and accessible approach.

services.intro: AG Facility Services provides preventive and corrective maintenance for commercial and institutional facilities under a structured model designed to ensure operational continuity and technical control.
services.sub_intro: Our services are organized through planned service frameworks tailored to each facility's operational needs.

areas.title: Interior Maintenance
areas.desc: Preservation and correction of internal facility elements.
areas.examples: Acoustic ceiling tiles · Gypsum board · Painting · Baseboards · Flooring · Doors · Furniture · Glass · Fascias

areas.title: Preventive and Corrective Electrical Maintenance
areas.desc: Inspection and care of operational electrical components.
areas.examples: Lighting fixtures · Switches · Receptacles · Electrical panels

areas.title: Preventive and Corrective Plumbing Maintenance
areas.desc: Scheduled interventions on visible sanitary systems.
areas.examples: Faucets · Angle valves · Toilets · Visible leak inspection

areas.title: Air Conditioning Maintenance
areas.desc: Scheduled preventive maintenance for mini-split and cassette units.
areas.examples: Filter cleaning · Diffusers · General unit inspection

areas.title: Exterior and Common Areas Maintenance
areas.desc: Preservation of external areas to maintain safety and institutional image.
areas.examples: Pressure washing · Solar panels · Corrective painting · Parking lines · Gate lubrication · Wall patching

services.footer_note: Additional services available under technical evaluation.

model.intro: An approach based on prevention, structure, and control.
model.desc: We operate under a scheduled model that integrates continuous inspection, preventive maintenance, and necessary operational corrections to keep each facility in functional and presentable condition.
model.desc2: Our system reduces emergencies, organizes pending tasks, and provides clear visibility into the status of the installation.

steps.title: Exploratory Meeting
steps.desc: A brief visit is scheduled to understand the facility and its general operation.

steps.title: Base Program Presentation
steps.desc: A structured maintenance proposal is presented according to the facility type.

steps.title: Service Activation
steps.desc: Once the base agreement is executed, a formal initial inspection is conducted to establish operational parameters.

steps.title: Scheduled Execution
steps.desc: The service framework is implemented on a weekly or biweekly basis according to the contracted program.

about.intro: AG Facility Services specializes in preventive and corrective maintenance for commercial and institutional facilities in Puerto Rico.
about.intro2: Our model is designed to provide structure, control, and operational continuity through scheduled visits, continuous oversight, and organized execution.
about.approach_title: Professional Experience in Commercial and Institutional Facilities
about.approach1: Our team has prior experience in commercial, hospital, and corporate facilities, participating in maintenance work, technical coordination, and interior improvements in active operational environments.
about.approach2: The accumulated experience in these environments has allowed us to develop a structured approach focused on operational continuity, institutional image, and prevention.
about.mission: To provide preventive and corrective maintenance services for commercial and institutional facilities in Puerto Rico through a structured, organized, and transparent model that ensures operational continuity, failure prevention, and administrative control.
about.vision: To become a leading reference in Puerto Rico for structured preventive maintenance in commercial and institutional facilities, recognized for organization, reliability, and scalable service models.

values.title: Structure
values.desc: We operate under organized frameworks that ensure consistent planning and clear execution.

values.title: Prevention
values.desc: We prioritize early identification of conditions to avoid operational disruptions.

values.title: Control
values.desc: We maintain documented tracking of every intervention and facility status.

values.title: Responsibility
values.desc: We clearly define service scope and stand behind our commitments.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: We build lasting relationships through consistency, transparency, and follow-through.

values.title: Legal Compliance
values.desc: We operate under contractual responsibility and applicable regulatory compliance.

contact.intro: If your organization is looking for a structured maintenance model, we are available to schedule a meeting and assess your operational needs.
contact.coverage_text: Services available for commercial and institutional facilities across the island.

form.name: Name
